scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly demonstrates the requires side using IngressPerAppRequirer with accurate class names, events, and properties. It focuses on the Python API (which is more practical) rather than the raw databag schema the gold standard describes, but both are correct representations of how to use ingress.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, on.ready, on.revoked, url property, and is_ready() all exist in the traefik-k8s library
